label: Interaktivt spel
summary: Instructions-only dossier for playable mini-games (Pac-Man, Snake, Tetris, platformers, arcade clones, quiz games). Enforces the state + loop + controls + collision + score + restart contract so output is actually playable rather than a static screenshot-alike. No verbatim files — game rules and visuals are always project-specific.
summarySv: Gör att sajten kan innehålla ett spelbart minispel med poäng, styrning och omstart, till exempel ett pussel- eller arkadspel. Välj det när du vill bjuda besökarna på något lekfullt; fungerar helt utan externa tjänster.
notes: Pure guidance — when the prompt is a game, the dossier makes the codegen-LLM produce React state, a real update loop, keyboard/touch controls, collision logic, a visible score, win/lose/restart, and accessibility primitives. If the same prompt also needs WebGL physics (bouncing/gravity/rigid bodies) the physics-3d dossier is selected in addition.
